text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hello there!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan and Dia
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for joining us for our first shrine visit of
the year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No one has greater hopes for the year than these
two. The three of us head to the shrine to make
our New Year's wishes.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I need to be at my strongest by the time the
Arima Kinen rolls around at the end of the year,
or else I'll never beat Dia...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So Trainer, do you think we could talk strategy
before I pray for extra support?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we decide Kitasan Black's racing agenda,
though, we first need to establish what we feel
sets her apart.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But... that's what we figured out last year, isn't it?
There's nothing in particular that sets me apart
from the others.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
My acceleration is average, my race performance
isn't eye-catching, and I don't possess any
promise as a star... But still!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I do my best and hold out to the very end of
every race I run! Doing so has allowed me to
slowly improve and gain more supporters.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If that's what I have going on for me, then let's
see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, I have a thought. If her performance
itself won't draw others in... then we'll just have to
play the numbers game instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's strength lies in her unparalleled
toughness. If we want to take advantage of that,
then I know just what to do this spring.
choice_data_list: Let's compete in all three spring G1 races!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Seriously?! All three of them?! But they're all huge
races that are medium-distance or longer!
choice_data_list:
Seriously. Let's enter the Osaka Hai, spring
Tenno Sho, and Takarazuka Kinen.

Seriously. Let's enter the Osaka Hai, spring
Tenno Sho, and Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she performs well in these three races, people's
expectations for her will no doubt rise.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I definitely think that would help... but it's
not enough!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Can I run even more after those three?
choice_data_list: You want to enter even more races?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If we're going to do back-to-back races, I want to
keep up the momentum until my run with Dia in
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
After the Takarazuka Kinen, I want to take on the
autumn Tenno Sho and Japan Cup before diving
into the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Could we please do six G1 races in a row? I know
this schedule is beyond reckless, but please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It'll be tough brute-forcing through so many races
in one year, but if there's anyone who can handle
that schedule and more, it's Kitasan Black.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Our first race is gonna be the Osaka Hai, huh?
And afterwards, if I manage to do well at the
spring Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I might be able to rank higher in the Takarazuka
Kinen's popularity poll. It'd be nice to rank higher
than third, like I did in last year's Arima...
choice_data_list:
We're aiming higher than that! Let's gun for first
place!

We're aiming higher than that! Let's gun for first
place!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You want me to try to become the most popular Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no turning back here. We have to prove
that she can be everyone's favorite even without
any innate showiness.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You're right... Let's aim for first! I'm going to
become the best and most popular Umamusume
around! And once I do...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'll be a big shot in title and skill, just like my dad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, this year's schedule is set and Kitasan
Black's wish takes on a more tangible form.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It looks like you've made up your mind, Kita.
Come on then, let's go and pray!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I wish to run well in all six consecutive G1 races in
my senior year and to put smiles on everyone's
faces!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I wish to conquer a G1 race! May I fulfill my
dearest wish and illuminate everyone with my
brilliant light as a Satono!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One wish bursts up from the earth while the other
shines down from the heavens. Though their
wishes take very different forms...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their feelings are the same. They both want to do
their best as Umamusume to give back to their
loved ones...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan and Dia
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our first shrine visit of the new year
finishes up without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right, Dia. You know what time it is! Let's get
started on our annual New Year showdown!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course. But what should we do this time?
We'll be running in the Arima Kinen at the end of
the year, so we should do it before that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears that having some kind of competition
at the start of every new year has become a
tradition for the two of them.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You know, we do have a third person here who
can help us out. Why don't we ask your trainer
what we should compete in?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Good idea! Hey, Trainer, pick something we can
really go all out in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would be boring if I just suggested they race
each other, so I try to think of something with a
New Year's flair.
choice_data_list:
Compete to see who can arrange a better face
in fukuwarai!
See who's faster in winter swimming!
Do a New Year's hike up a mountain!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, fukuwarai! That's the game where you try to
put facial features on a blank face while
blindfolded, right? Let's play it at my house, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we head over to Kitasan Black's family
home.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... I think the eyes should go here! And I'll
put the nose around here! How'd I do?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! What in the world is this face, Kita?
Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
How did you manage to make it look so hilarious?
It's not fair!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I-is it really that funny? You're laughing so hard
at it, Dia...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Pfft! Ahahaha! You've got me laughing too!
Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two roll around on the floor in fits of
laughter. Playing fukuwarai was clearly a great
decision, and it put them in fantastic moods.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this, New Year's Day draws to a close and
Kitasan Black boldly embarks on her journey to
take on the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
A winter swimming competition! Okay, then let's
have our battle in the pool! I won't lose to you,
Dia!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, they dive right into their swimming
competition...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that was a good swim! It was pretty
interesting how we both used different strokes,
huh, Dia?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It was. I prefer using the front crawl and
backstroke.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And I'm better at breaststroke and butterfly. I
guess I'm pretty good at Horsegirl-paddling too.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hey, since we're here in the pool and everything,
why don't we teach each other our specialty
strokes?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Good idea! I always wanted to learn the
Horsegirl-paddle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as their upbringings differ, so to do their
swimming styles. By teaching each other, they
learn how to use their bodies in new and different
ways.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this, New Year's Day draws to a close and
Kitasan Black boldly embarks on her journey to
take on the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
A New Year's hike? I guess we're trail running,
then.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that sounds interesting. All right, seeing as
it's the New Year, let's try going up a mountain
we can't usually climb!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, they choose a mountain to tackle...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, running on a snowy mountain is tough. I
won't lose to you, though!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're right. The way you use your legs is
completely different to usual, isn't it? This is
probably even better training than incline
running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running together on a snowy mountain in winter
allows them to glean new methods on how to
improve their running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this, New Year's Day draws to a close and
Kitasan Black boldly embarks on her journey to
take on the Osaka Hai.
